title: microtis eremicola
intro: Microtis eremicola, also known as the Desert Greenhood or the Little Greenhood, is a small, terrestrial orchid species native to Western Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microtis eremicola include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
